## Trigger prompt

## Structural insight

User identified that legal practice has the same structural substrate as ORGANVM/PDE/meta-processor/Person-Tied Macro — corpus contextual omnipotence, multi-agent orchestration at tempo, parallel theoretical processes. This **becomes three things simultaneously**:
1. Pitch for Micah (post-lawsuit, productized substrate offered to legal practice)
2. Internal judicial system (governance/adjudication layer ORGANVM currently lacks)
3. Products scaling micro through macro for artifacts and ecosystem

Resolution: This is **instancing**, not invention. Substrate already exists.
